characters.name: Marcus Vance
characters.mask: L3 Junior Backend Developer who wants a quiet, stress-free life
characters.trueNature: A brilliant, high-stakes architect who thrives on control and technical mastery

characters.name: Richard Sterling
characters.trueNature: Incompetent, panic-prone, and technically illiterate leader

characters.name: Evelyn Vance
characters.trueNature: Pragmatic, opportunistic power-broker who values competence above all else

pressureChoices.pressure: System failure threatening to destroy the company and client data
pressureChoices.choiceA: Stay hidden as an L3 and let the company fail
pressureChoices.choiceB: Intervene, reveal his true identity, and fix the system
pressureChoices.chosen: Intervene, reveal his true identity, and fix the system

pressureChoices.pressure: Cascading server failure and board scrutiny
pressureChoices.choiceA: Hard-reset the cluster (wiping data, risking lawsuits)
pressureChoices.choiceB: Wait for a technical fix (risking total system collapse)

pressureChoices.pressure: Evelyn offering him the CEO position
pressureChoices.choiceA: Reject the offer and return to his quiet L3 life
pressureChoices.choiceB: Accept the CEO role to fix the company and protect his peers

dimensions.positive: willing to do the 'grunt work' of a junior dev
dimensions.negative: arrogantly assumes he is the only one capable of fixing the system

dimensions.positive: projects the image of a strong, decisive leader
dimensions.negative: lacks the technical understanding to make informed decisions

emotionalMoments.trigger: The system recovery after the near-catastrophic failure
Successfully forcing the handshake and stabilizing the system

desires.consciousDesire: To be a low-level developer with no responsibilities
desires.subconsciousDesire: To be in control of a system he respects and to lead effectively

desires.consciousDesire: To maintain his status and satisfy the board
desires.subconsciousDesire: To be seen as a competent leader (which he is not)

desires.consciousDesire: To protect the company's market cap
desires.subconsciousDesire: To secure a high-performing asset (Marcus) to maximize her investment
